title: Opinion: Opinion | Ceasefire Aside, Iran Won't Give Up On A Hormuz 'Toll'
summary_full: Iran has not agreed to reopen the Strait, but to allow passage via "coordination" with its Armed Forces. Even the IRGC Navy has said that the Strait "will never return to its former state".
summary_public: Iran has not agreed to reopen the Strait, but to allow passage via "coordination" with its Armed Forces. Even the IRGC Navy has said that the Strait "will never return to its former state".

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Won't Give Up On A Hormuz 'Toll'
